Title: Create Plant
Test Steps:
1. Call create() method on DataManager.
2. Pass PlantName and PlantType as parameters.
3. Verify that PlantName and PlantType are stored correctly.
Expected Result: Plant details are successfully created and stored in the database.

Title: Read Plant
Test Steps:
1. Call read() method on DataManager.
2. Pass PlantID as parameter.
3. Verify that correct PlantName and PlantType are returned.
Expected Result: Correct PlantName and PlantType are returned.

Title: Update Plant
Test Steps:
1. Call update() method on DataManager.
2. Pass PlantID, NewPlantName, and NewPlantType as parameters.
3. Verify that PlantName and PlantType are updated correctly.
Expected Result: PlantName and PlantType are successfully updated in the database.

Title: Delete Plant
Test Steps:
1. Call delete() method on DataManager.
2. Pass PlantID as parameter.
3. Verify that Plant is deleted from the database.
Expected Result: Plant is successfully deleted from the database.

Title: Insert Plant
Preconditions: User has access to Inserimento/Modifica Piante.
Test Steps:
1. Call insert() method on Inserimento/Modifica Piante.
2. Pass PlantName and PlantType as parameters.
3. Verify that PlantName and PlantType are stored correctly.

Title: Modify Plant
Test Steps:
1. Call modify() method on Inserimento/Modifica Piante.
2. Pass PlantID, NewPlantName, and NewPlantType as parameters.
3. Verify that PlantName and PlantType are updated correctly.
Expected Result: PlantName and PlantType are successfully modified.

Title: Read Plant Details
Test Steps:
1. Call read() method on Lettura Piante.
2. Pass PlantID as parameter.
3. Verify that correct PlantName and PlantType are returned.
Expected Result: Correct PlantName and PlantType are returned.

Title: Insert User Information
Preconditions: User has access to Informazioni Utente.
Test Steps:
1. Call insert() method on Informazioni Utente.
2. Pass Username and Email as parameters.
3. Verify that Username and Email are stored correctly.

Title: Modify User Information
Preconditions: User information exists in the database.
Test Steps:
1. Call modify() method on Informazioni Utente.
2. Pass UserID, NewUsername, and NewEmail as parameters.
3. Verify that Username and Email are updated correctly.

Title: Execute Access Operation
Preconditions: User has access to Operazioni di Accesso.
Test Steps:
1. Call execute() method on Operazioni di Accesso.
2. Pass OperationType as parameter.
3. Verify that the operation is executed successfully.

Title: Insert Diary
Preconditions: User has access to Inserimento/Modifica Diario.
Test Steps:
1. Call insert() method on Inserimento/Modifica Diario.
2. Pass DiaryName and DiaryType as parameters.
3. Verify that DiaryName and DiaryType are stored correctly.

Title: Modify Diary
Test Data: DiaryID: 1, NewDiaryName: Home Diary, NewDiaryType: Personal
Test Steps:
1. Call modify() method on Inserimento/Modifica Diario.
2. Pass DiaryID, NewDiaryName, and NewDiaryType as parameters.
3. Verify that DiaryName and DiaryType are updated correctly.
Expected Result: DiaryName and DiaryType are successfully modified.

Title: Read Diary Details
Test Steps:
1. Call read() method on Lettura Diario.
2. Pass DiaryID as parameter.
3. Verify that correct DiaryName and DiaryType are returned.
Expected Result: Correct DiaryName and DiaryType are returned.

Title: Navigate to Diary
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Diario" link on Home page.
2. Verify that user navigates to the Diary page.
Expected Result: User navigates to the Diary page.

Title: Navigate to Anabli Pianta
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Anabli Pianta" link on Home page.
2. Verify that user navigates to the Anabli Pianta page.
Expected Result: User navigates to the Anabli Pianta page.

Title: Navigate to Le Mie Piantle
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Le mie piantle" link on Home page.
2. Verify that user navigates to the Le Mie Piantle page.
Expected Result: User navigates to the Le Mie Piantle page.

Title: Navigate to Fotocamera
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Fotocamera" link on Home page.
2. Verify that user navigates to the Fotocamera page.
Expected Result: User navigates to the Fotocamera page.

Title: Sign Out
Test Steps:
1. Call signOut() method on Authentication.
2. Verify that user is signed out.

Title: Update Password
Test Steps:
1. Call updatePassword() method on Authentication.
2. Pass NewPassword as parameter.
3. Verify that password is updated successfully.

Title: Sign In with Email and Password
Preconditions: User does not have an active session.
Test Steps:
1. Call signInWithEmailAndPassword() method on Authentication.
2. Pass Email and Password as parameters.
3. Verify that user is signed in successfully.

Title: Create User with Email and Password
Preconditions: No user with the given email exists.
Test Steps:
1. Call createUserWithEmailAndPassword() method on Authentication.
2. Pass Email and Password as parameters.
3. Verify that new user is created successfully.

Title: Ask Text
Test Steps:
1. Call askText() method on Gemini AI.
2. Pass Text as parameter.
3. Verify that response is received.

Title: Ask Text with Images
Preconditions: Gemini AI is available and images are provided.
Test Data: Text: "Identify the plant in the image." Images: [image1.jpg, image2.jpg]
Test Steps:
1. Call askTextWithImages() method on Gemini AI.
2. Pass Text and Images as parameters.
3. Verify that response is received.

Title: Upload Image
Preconditions: User has access to Firebase Storage.
Test Steps:
1. Call uploadImage() method on Firebase Storage.
2. Pass Image as parameter.
3. Verify that image is uploaded successfully.

Title: Get Personal Folders
Preconditions: User has access to Firebase Storage.
Test Steps:
1. Call getPersonalFolders() method on Firebase Storage.
2. Verify that personal folders are retrieved successfully.

Title: Get Image from Folder
Test Steps:
1. Call getImageFromFolder() method on Firebase Storage.
2. Pass Folder and Image as parameters.
3. Verify that image is retrieved successfully.

Title: Download Image from Path
Preconditions: Image exists at the specified path.
Test Steps:
1. Call downloadImageFromPath() method on Firebase Storage.
2. Pass Path as parameter.
3. Verify that image is downloaded successfully.

Title: Request Token
Test Steps:
1. Call requestToken() method on LocalUser.
2. Verify that token is generated successfully.

Title: Confirm Token
Test Steps:
1. Call confirmToken() method on LocalUser.
2. Pass Token as parameter.
3. Verify that token is confirmed successfully.
